verses.1: A Psalm of the sons of Korah. A Song. His foundation is in the holy mountains.
verses.2: The LORD loves the gates of Zion More than all the other dwelling places of Jacob.
verses.3: Glorious things are spoken of you, City of God. Selah
verses.4: “I shall mention Rahab and Babylon among those who know Me; Behold, Philistia and Tyre with Cush: ‘This one was born there.’”
verses.5: But of Zion it will be said, “This one and that one were born in her”; And the Most High Himself will establish her.
verses.6: The LORD will count when He registers the peoples, “This one was born there.” Selah
verses.7: Then those who sing as well as those who play the flutes will say, “All my springs of joy are in you.”
